mapper.select:
/* CR0901M01.selectLgistPlanList - 물류진행 예정정보 현황 조회 (UNION 구조 개편) */ WITH WBS_INFO AS ( /* WBS 마감 및 일정 정보 사전 추출 - 최신 버전(Max VER_NO) 반영 */ SELECT W22.CO_CD , W22.SALES_CD , W22.WBS_PLANS_DT , W22.WBS_PLANE_DT , W22.WBS_PLAN_MNG_ID , W21.VER_NO FROM TB_WB22M01 W22 INNER JOIN ( SELECT CO_CD, SALES_CD, CLOSE_YN, VER_NO FROM ( SELECT CO_CD, SALES_CD, CLOSE_YN, VER_NO, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY CO_CD, SALES_CD ORDER BY LPAD(NVL(VER_NO, '0'), 10, '0') DESC) AS VER_RN FROM TB_WB21M01 ) WHERE VER_RN = 1 ) W21 ON W22.SALES_CD = W21.SALES_CD AND W22.VER_NO = W21.VER_NO WHERE W21.CLOSE_YN = 'Y' AND W22.WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID = 'WBSCODE11' AND W22.WBS_PLAN_MNG_ID IS NOT NULL ), LGIST_REQ_INFO AS ( /* 순수 물류진행요청(TB_CR11M01)에 등록된 내역 추출 (미완료건 포함) */ SELECT M11.CO_CD , M11.ORDRS_NO , M11.LGIST_NO , D11.SALES_CD , NVL(M11.LGIST_COMPL_YN, 'N') AS LGIST_COMPL_YN , M11.LGIST_COMPL_DTTM , M11.TRNS_DIV , M11.DMS_TRNS_AREA_DIV , M11.OVS_TRNS_AREA_DIV , M11.DMS_SEND_CND_DIV , M11.OVS_SEND_CND_DIV , M11.DMS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC , M11.OVS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC , M11.DMS_PACK_KIND_DIV , M11.OVS_PACK_KIND_DIV , M11.ARVL_PLACE , M11.ARVL_CHRG_CONT , M11.ARVL_ADDR , M11.FILE_TRGT_KEY , M11.SHIPMNT_DT , M11.HOPE_ARVL_DT FROM TB_CR11M01 M11 INNER JOIN TB_CR11D01 D11 ON M11.LGIST_NO = D11.LGIST_NO ), UNION_DATA AS ( /* ========================================================================= 1. 수주에서 추출한 물류 예정정보 (물류요청서 유무와 상관없이 WBS 기간 내 조회) ========================================================================= */ SELECT D04.CO_CD , D04.ORDRS_NO , D02.SALES_CD , D02.ORDRS_QTY
, M01.ORDRS_CLNT_CD , B02.CLNT_NM AS ORDRS_CLNT_NM , M01.MNG_ID , FN_CM06M01_ID_TO_NM(M01.MNG_ID) AS MNG_ID_NM
, CASE WHEN W.WBS_PLANE_DT IS NULL THEN '수주' ELSE 'WBS' END AS LGIST_TYPE , D04.TRNS_DIV -- TB_CR02D04 ORG 컬럼들 , D04.DMS_TRNS_AREA_DIV , D04.DMS_SEND_CND_DIV , D04.DMS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC , D04.DMS_PACK_KIND_DIV , D04.OVS_TRNS_AREA_DIV , D04.OVS_SEND_CND_DIV , D04.OVS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC , D04.OVS_PACK_KIND_DIV , D04.ARVL_PLACE AS D04_ARVL_PLACE , D04.ARVL_CHRG_CONT AS D04_ARVL_CHRG_CONT , D04.ARVL_ADDR AS D04_ARVL_ADDR
, W.WBS_PLAN_MNG_ID , FN_CM06M01_ID_TO_NM(W.WBS_PLAN_MNG_ID) AS PLAN_MNG_ID_NM , TO_CHAR(W.WBS_PLANS_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS WBS_STA_DT , TO_CHAR(W.WBS_PLANE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS WBS_END_DT
, FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(NVL(REQ.TRNS_DIV, D04.TRNS_DIV)) AS TRNS_DIV_NM , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(CASE WHEN NVL(REQ.TRNS_DIV, D04.TRNS_DIV) = 'LGISTDIV0301' THEN NVL(REQ.DMS_TRNS_AREA_DIV, D04.DMS_TRNS_AREA_DIV) ELSE NVL(REQ.OVS_TRNS_AREA_DIV, D04.OVS_TRNS_AREA_DIV) END) AS TRNS_AREA_DIV_NM , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(CASE WHEN NVL(REQ.TRNS_DIV, D04.TRNS_DIV) = 'LGISTDIV0301' THEN NVL(REQ.DMS_SEND_CND_DIV, D04.DMS_SEND_CND_DIV) ELSE NVL(REQ.OVS_SEND_CND_DIV, D04.OVS_SEND_CND_DIV) END) AS SEND_CND_DIV_NM , CASE WHEN NVL(REQ.TRNS_DIV, D04.TRNS_DIV) = 'LGISTDIV0301' THEN NVL(REQ.DMS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC, D04.DMS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC) ELSE NVL(REQ.OVS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC, D04.OVS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC) END AS SEND_CND_DIV_ETC , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(CASE WHEN NVL(REQ.TRNS_DIV, D04.TRNS_DIV) = 'LGISTDIV0301' THEN NVL(REQ.DMS_PACK_KIND_DIV, D04.DMS_PACK_KIND_DIV) ELSE NVL(REQ.OVS_PACK_KIND_DIV, D04.OVS_PACK_KIND_DIV) END) AS PACK_KIND_DIV_NM
, NVL(REQ.ARVL_PLACE, D04.ARVL_PLACE) AS ARVL_PLACE , NVL(REQ.ARVL_CHRG_CONT, D04.ARVL_CHRG_CONT) AS ARVL_CHRG_CONT , NVL(REQ.ARVL_ADDR, D04.ARVL_ADDR) AS ARVL_ADDR
, REQ.LGIST_NO , NVL(REQ.LGIST_COMPL_YN, 'N') AS LGIST_COMPL_YN , TO_CHAR(REQ.LGIST_COMPL_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS LGIST_COMPL_DT , CASE WHEN REQ.LGIST_COMPL_YN = 'Y' THEN '완료' ELSE '예정' END AS LGIST_STATUS
, '' AS FILE_TRGT_KEY , '' AS REQ_NO FROM TB_CR02D02 D02 INNER JOIN TB_CR02D04 D04 ON D02.CO_CD = D04.CO_CD AND D02.ORDRS_NO = D04.ORDRS_NO INNER JOIN TB_CR02M01 M01 ON D02.CO_CD = M01.CO_CD AND D02.ORDRS_NO = M01.ORDRS_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN WBS_INFO W ON D02.SALES_CD = W.SALES_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN LGIST_REQ_INFO REQ ON D02.SALES_CD = REQ.SALES_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_BM02M01 B02 ON B02.CLNT_CD = M01.ORDRS_CLNT_CD WHERE D04.CO_CD = #{coCd} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_CR11D01 X JOIN TB_CR11M01 M ON M.LGIST_NO = X.LGIST_NO WHERE M.CO_CD = D02.CO_CD AND X.SALES_CD = D02.SALES_CD )
AND (W.WBS_PLANS_DT >= #{wbsDtFr} AND W.WBS_PLANE_DT <= #{wbsDtTo})
UNION
/* ========================================================================= 2. 물류요청이 발행되어 완료되지 않은 것 (WBS 검색 기간 무관하게 조회) ========================================================================= */ SELECT REQ.CO_CD , REQ.ORDRS_NO
, REQ.SALES_CD , D02.ORDRS_QTY
, M01.ORDRS_CLNT_CD , B02.CLNT_NM AS ORDRS_CLNT_NM , M01.MNG_ID , FN_CM06M01_ID_TO_NM(M01.MNG_ID) AS MNG_ID_NM , '물류' AS LGIST_TYPE , REQ.TRNS_DIV , REQ.DMS_TRNS_AREA_DIV , REQ.DMS_SEND_CND_DIV , REQ.DMS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC , REQ.DMS_PACK_KIND_DIV , REQ.OVS_TRNS_AREA_DIV , REQ.OVS_SEND_CND_DIV , REQ.OVS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC , REQ.OVS_PACK_KIND_DIV , REQ.ARVL_PLACE AS D04_ARVL_PLACE , REQ.ARVL_CHRG_CONT AS D04_ARVL_CHRG_CONT , REQ.ARVL_ADDR AS D04_ARVL_ADDR
, W.WBS_PLAN_MNG_ID , FN_CM06M01_ID_TO_NM(W.WBS_PLAN_MNG_ID) AS PLAN_MNG_ID_NM , REQ.SHIPMNT_DT AS WBS_STA_DT , REQ.HOPE_ARVL_DT AS WBS_END_DT
, FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(REQ.TRNS_DIV) AS TRNS_DIV_NM , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(CASE WHEN REQ.TRNS_DIV = 'LGISTDIV0301' THEN REQ.DMS_TRNS_AREA_DIV ELSE REQ.OVS_TRNS_AREA_DIV END) AS TRNS_AREA_DIV_NM , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(CASE WHEN REQ.TRNS_DIV = 'LGISTDIV0301' THEN REQ.DMS_SEND_CND_DIV ELSE REQ.OVS_SEND_CND_DIV END) AS SEND_CND_DIV_NM , CASE WHEN REQ.TRNS_DIV = 'LGISTDIV0301' THEN REQ.DMS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC ELSE REQ.OVS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC END AS SEND_CND_DIV_ETC , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(CASE WHEN REQ.TRNS_DIV = 'LGISTDIV0301' THEN REQ.DMS_PACK_KIND_DIV ELSE REQ.OVS_PACK_KIND_DIV END) AS PACK_KIND_DIV_NM
, NVL(REQ.ARVL_PLACE, D04.ARVL_PLACE) AS ARVL_PLACE , NVL(REQ.ARVL_CHRG_CONT, D04.ARVL_CHRG_CONT) AS ARVL_CHRG_CONT , NVL(REQ.ARVL_ADDR, D04.ARVL_ADDR) AS ARVL_ADDR
, REQ.LGIST_NO , NVL(REQ.LGIST_COMPL_YN, 'N') AS LGIST_COMPL_YN , TO_CHAR(REQ.LGIST_COMPL_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS LGIST_COMPL_DT , CASE WHEN REQ.LGIST_COMPL_YN = 'Y' THEN '완료' ELSE '예정' END AS LGIST_STATUS
, REQ.FILE_TRGT_KEY , '' AS REQ_NO FROM LGIST_REQ_INFO REQ LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CR02D02 D02 ON D02.CO_CD = REQ.CO_CD AND D02.SALES_CD = REQ.SALES_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CR02D04 D04 ON D02.CO_CD = D04.CO_CD AND D02.ORDRS_NO = D04.ORDRS_NO INNER JOIN TB_CR02M01 M01 ON D02.CO_CD = M01.CO_CD AND D02.ORDRS_NO = M01.ORDRS_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN WBS_INFO W ON D02.SALES_CD = W.SALES_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_BM02M01 B02 ON B02.CLNT_CD = M01.ORDRS_CLNT_CD WHERE REQ.CO_CD = #{coCd}
UNION /* ========================================================================= 3. 발주요청서에서 물류요청이 발행되어 완료되지 않은 것 ========================================================================= */ SELECT QM.CO_CD , D02.ORDRS_NO
, QM.SALES_CD , D02.ORDRS_QTY
, M01.ORDRS_CLNT_CD , B02.CLNT_NM AS ORDRS_CLNT_NM , M01.MNG_ID , FN_CM06M01_ID_TO_NM(M01.MNG_ID) AS MNG_ID_NM , '발주' AS LGIST_TYPE , Q04.TRNS_DIV , Q04.DMS_TRNS_AREA_DIV , Q04.DMS_SEND_CND_DIV , Q04.DMS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC , Q04.DMS_PACK_KIND_DIV , Q04.OVS_TRNS_AREA_DIV , Q04.OVS_SEND_CND_DIV , Q04.OVS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC , Q04.OVS_PACK_KIND_DIV , Q04.ARVL_PLACE AS D04_ARVL_PLACE , Q04.ARVL_CHRG_CONT AS D04_ARVL_CHRG_CONT , Q04.ARVL_ADDR AS D04_ARVL_ADDR
, W.WBS_PLAN_MNG_ID , FN_CM06M01_ID_TO_NM(W.WBS_PLAN_MNG_ID) AS PLAN_MNG_ID_NM , TO_CHAR(QM.REQ_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS WBS_STA_DT , TO_CHAR(QM.CUST_REQ_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS WBS_STA_DT
, FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(Q04.TRNS_DIV) AS TRNS_DIV_NM , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(CASE WHEN Q04.TRNS_DIV = 'LGISTDIV0301' THEN Q04.DMS_TRNS_AREA_DIV ELSE Q04.OVS_TRNS_AREA_DIV END) AS TRNS_AREA_DIV_NM , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(CASE WHEN Q04.TRNS_DIV = 'LGISTDIV0301' THEN Q04.DMS_SEND_CND_DIV ELSE Q04.OVS_SEND_CND_DIV END) AS SEND_CND_DIV_NM , CASE WHEN Q04.TRNS_DIV = 'LGISTDIV0301' THEN Q04.DMS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC ELSE Q04.OVS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC END AS SEND_CND_DIV_ETC , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(CASE WHEN Q04.TRNS_DIV = 'LGISTDIV0301' THEN Q04.DMS_PACK_KIND_DIV ELSE Q04.OVS_PACK_KIND_DIV END) AS PACK_KIND_DIV_NM
, NVL(Q04.ARVL_PLACE, D04.ARVL_PLACE) AS ARVL_PLACE , NVL(Q04.ARVL_CHRG_CONT, D04.ARVL_CHRG_CONT) AS ARVL_CHRG_CONT , NVL(Q04.ARVL_ADDR, D04.ARVL_ADDR) AS ARVL_ADDR
, LG.LGIST_NO , NVL(LG.LGIST_COMPL_YN, 'N') AS LGIST_COMPL_YN , TO_CHAR(LG.LGIST_COMPL_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS LGIST_COMPL_DT , CASE WHEN LG.LGIST_COMPL_YN = 'Y' THEN '완료' ELSE '예정' END AS LGIST_STATUS
, LG.FILE_TRGT_KEY , Q04.REQ_NO FROM TB_QM01D04 Q04 JOIN TB_QM01M01 QM ON QM.REQ_NO = Q04.REQ_NO JOIN TB_CR02D02 D02 ON D02.CO_CD = QM.CO_CD AND D02.SALES_CD = QM.SALES_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CR02D04 D04 ON D02.CO_CD = D04.CO_CD AND D02.ORDRS_NO = D04.ORDRS_NO JOIN TB_CR02M01 M01 ON M01.CO_CD = D02.CO_CD AND M01.ORDRS_NO = D02.ORDRS_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_BM02M01 B02 ON B02.CLNT_CD = M01.ORDRS_CLNT_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN WBS_INFO W ON D02.SALES_CD = W.SALES_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN LGIST_REQ_INFO LG ON QM.SALES_CD = LG.SALES_CD WHERE QM.CO_CD = #{coCd} ) SELECT U.* FROM UNION_DATA U WHERE 1 = 1
AND U.ORDRS_CLNT_CD = #{ordrsClntCd}
AND U.ORDRS_CLNT_NM LIKE '%' || #{clntNm} || '%'
AND U.SALES_CD LIKE '%' || #{salesCd} || '%'
AND U.MNG_ID_NM LIKE '%' || #{mngIdNm} || '%'
AND U.PLAN_MNG_ID_NM LIKE '%' || #{planMngIdNm} || '%'
AND U.LGIST_COMPL_YN = 'N'
AND U.LGIST_COMPL_YN = 'Y'
AND U.LGIST_TYPE = #{lgistType_S}
/* 수주번호, SalesCD , 고객사명, 물류번호순 정렬 */ ORDER BY U.ORDRS_NO DESC, U.SALES_CD ASC, U.ORDRS_CLNT_NM ASC,U.LGIST_NO DESC
